post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 309

Important Rules:
Do not edit or delete posts
Do not post during night
Do not post if you are dead or if you are not in the game
Do not talk about anything related to this game outside this thread
Read all the rules!


Rules
  • Rules
    • 1.1: Read the rules. All of them. Read them multiple times if necessary.
    • 1.2: Do not post at night.
    • 1.3: You may PM me at any time and ask me anything, such as rule clarification.
    • 1.4: Do not talk about this game outside of this topic to anyone other than the mods in charge, unless I specifically allow you to do so.
    • 1.5: You may not use any formatting that has an effect of concealing text. This includes size=1, hide="", color=#FFFFFF, and color=white, among others. This does not include adding extra spaces.
    • 1.6: Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted; this includes editing right after you post (what goes in the thread stays in the thread). If you for any reason find the need to change your post, use EBWOP or EBWON as necessary.
    • 1.7: If you are not a living participant of the game, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.
    • 1.8: Do not advocate for breaking the rules.
    • 1.9: Do not use the colors red (#FF0000), blue (#0000FF), green (#00FF00), or anything that appears similar, as these colors are used for modding purposes.
    • 1.10: Confirm your participation in the game by making a post stating the important rules
  • Voting/Elimination Procedures
    • 2.1: Post votes in code tags in the format 
      [code]Vote: <insert player here>[/‎code]

      Since AoPS does not distinguish between usernames with different capitalizations, the capitalization of the player name does not matter. A proper vote looks like 
      Vote: fdas
    • 2.2: Votes may not be placed in hide tags.
    • 2.3: Improperly made votes will not be counted under any circumstances. It does not matter if it is the end of the game hammer and everyone revealed their roles. Hint: don’t reveal your roles and declare victory until I made the official end of the game post.
    • 2.4: You may vote for no hang/elimination to occur during a day. Vote this by including in your post 
      Vote: No Hang
      or 
      Vote: No Elimination
    • 2.5: You do not have to unvote before making a new vote, though it is appreciated if you do so. Unvote in the format 
      Vote: Unvote

      An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any.
    • 2.6: Spell the username of the player you wish to vote for exactly. Do not use nicknames.
    • 2.7: If at any point in a day more than half of the votes are for a single player, that player will be hanged. It will then immediately be twilight.
    • 2.8: If at any point in a day at least half of the votes are for no hang, then there will be no hang. It will then be twilight.
    • 2.9: If the deadline is met and no player has been hanged, the amount of votes required for a Hang or a No Hang will be reduced by 1. The vote threshold will reduce by 1 vote every 24 hours after this. For example, if there are 8 players alive in the game, 5 votes will be required to hang someone and 4 votes are required for a no hang. Once the deadline passes, 4 votes will be sufficient to hang someone and 3 votes are sufficient for a no hang. 24 hours after the deadline, 3 votes will be sufficient to hang someone and 2 votes are sufficient for a no hang.
    • 2.10: If the vote threshold is decreased and two or more options have both reached the threshold required, then the game will enter tiebreak. During tiebreak, votes can continue to be changed. If at any point in time, only one option has enough votes to meet the threshold required for the option to be enacted, day will immediately end. Or, if any option gains votes and now exceeds the vote threshold by an amount of votes strictly greater than the amount of votes any other option exceeds their vote threshold by, that option will win and day will immediately end. If 24 hours have passed since tiebreak has begun, and the votes are still deadlocked, there will be no hang.
    • 2.11: After an option has won the vote, it will become twilight and players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
    • 2.12: Once I post a end-of-day scene, the person hanged (if any) is officially dead. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.
  • Activity
    • 3.1: Each day will be 168 hours (1 week). The moderator may extend the deadline for the end of the day at his/her discretion. Note that this will be unlikely.
    • 3.2: The deadlines will follow the official time
    • 3.3: The deadline will occur the very second 168 hours has elapsed.
    • 3.4: The night deadline will be 72 hours after night begins.
    • 3.5: When the night deadline is met, if the moderator does not receive a night action from either a player or his/her partner(s) (if you have them), the player will lose the chance to perform an action during that night.
    • 3.6: Any night results will be sent after the night deadline
    • 3.7: Night will end at some time after the night deadline when the mod makes the post announcing the end of night.
    • 3.8: If a player does not post in a 48-hour period and he/she is not in V/LA, you will receive an in-game prod.
    • 3.9: If a player does not post in another 24-hour period after receiving an in-game prod and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will receive a PM prod.
    • 3.10: If a player does not post in another 48-hour period after receiving a PM prod and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will be replaced, unless you post before the moderator finds a replacement.
    • 3.11: If a player receives 5 PM Prods, he/she will be replaced
    • 3.12: If a player is going to be V/LA, he/she must post in bold in-thread or PM me. The moderator will not prod the player unless the V/LA is too long.

  • Etiquette
    • 4.1: Do not use inappropriate language.
    • 4.2: Do not make any personal attacks.
    • 4.3: Follow all of the rules.
    • 4.4: Be mature.
    • 4.5: For a minor rule infraction, players can receive up to two warnings. If a player commits an infraction after he/she has run out of warnings, or commits a modkill level infraction, he/she will be modkilled or force replaced. Please do not make me modkill you.

  • Moderators/Co-Moderators
    • 5.1: I fdas am the moderator of Mafia 309
    • 5.2: Red-colored text (#FF0000) is used for official votecounts and activity checks by the moderators. It is also used for mafia flavor-related posts.
    • 5.3: Blue-colored text (#0000FF) is used for the moderator and co-mod's posts other than votecounts and activity checks.
    • 5.4: Green-colored text (#00FF00) is used for town flavor-related posts.
    • 5.5: The not voting section is to be ignored if it contradicts any other part of the votecount
    • 5.6: If an error to the votecount is not pointed out within 5 days, the incorrect votecount will become official.
    • 5.7: The moderator may change the rules at any time.
    • 5.8: The moderator has the last say in interpreting the rules.

  • Read all of the rules

Setup
This game will use the Matrix6 setup. This is a semi-open setup.

In this setup, there are 9 players. Three of the roles will be generated randomly by picking a row or column from the matrix. Then one Mafia Goon and 5 Vanilla Townies are added to maintain a 2:7 mafia:town ratio. The six possible setups are:
1. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Jailkeeper, 1 1-Shot Bulletproof Townie, 1 Mafia Roleblocker, 1 Mafia Goon
2. 6 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Cop, 2 Mafia Goons
3. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Doctor, 1 Town Tracker, 2 Mafia Goons
4. 6 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Jailkeeper, 2 Mafia Goons
5. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Cop, 1 Town Doctor, 1 Mafia Goon, 1 Mafia Roleblocker
6. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 1-Shot Bulletproof Townie, 1 Town Tracker, 2 Mafia Goons


Role PMs
Quote:
You are a Vanilla Townie. You have no other power other than your vote.

You win when all members of the Mafia are dead.
Quote:
You are a Cop. Every night, you may target one person and determine their alignment.

You win when all members of the Mafia are dead.
Quote:
You are a Doctor. Every night you may heal someone, allowing them to survive if they would have otherwise died. You may not heal yourself two nights in a row.

You win when all members of the Mafia are dead.
Quote:
You are a Tracker. Every night you may target someone and learn who they visited.

You win when all members of the Mafia are dead.
Quote:
You are a Jailkeeper. Each night you may choose someone to put in jail. That person will be unable to perform any actions that night and nightkills attempting to target that person will be blocked.

You win when all members of the Mafia are dead.
Quote:
You are a 1-Shot Bulletproof Townie. On the first time that you are attacked by the Mafia, that attack will be negated.

You win when all members of the Mafia are dead.
Quote:
You are a Mafia Goon. During the night you may talk with your partner () here to discuss who you want to eliminate.

You win when all members of the Town are dead.
Quote:
You are a Mafia Roleblocker. During the night you may talk with your partner () here to discuss who you want to eliminate. You may also target someone and that person will be unable to perform any actions that night. Your ability takes precedence over the jailkeeper.

You win when all members of the Town are dead.


Alive (3)
BananaBall00
fossasor
Ryouma29


Dead(6)
tintin21 (Town Doctor)
ad333 (Vanilla Townie)
Mathisaac (Mafia Goon)
EntropiaAwake (Vanilla Townie)
mhgelgi (Vanilla Townie)
DittoDino (Town Tracker)


Events
Day 1: tintin21 hanged
Night 1: ad333 died
Day 2: Mathisaac hanged
Night 2: EntropiaAwake died
Day 3: mhgelgi hanged
Night 3: DittoDino died

PM Prods
 


Warnings
 


Do not post until this line is crossed out

Day 1 begins at 15:00:00 EST 9 November 2025.

post_rendered:
Hi, I'm going to copy and paste the post I made in 307

hello! I'm bananaball00 and im one of the more experienced players in this game
if you are new to mafia, please read the below post
if you are not new to mafia, I still recommend reading it, there's always something new to learn
ad333 wrote:
Ok hi i made a wallpost for the newbies this morning because i was bored & also it's fun I'm sure this will be the one that teaches everybody everything

So Mafia was invented in 1987 by Russian professor D--
(just kidding)

Firstly, hi welcome nice to meet you all!! I'm ad333 & I'm one of the three experienced players in this newbie game, along with WisteriaV and ostriches88. We're here to help you learn how to play the game, so if you have any questions please direct them at us. This includes any terms we use that you're unfamiliar with (I'm particularly guilty of this). But for a start, there's this post!

Second, if you are not a Vanilla Townie, for the purposes of your posts here, yes you are. The following sections are obviously most optimized for players who are not a Vanilla Townie but I'd advise you give them a quick read just if you are so that you're up to date with the strategies. Also I know everybody read all the rules, including the setup but Here's how the setup works
There are 6 possible setups, and one of them is randomly chosen. Nobody knows which one was chosen, but some players have a clue. If the mafia have 2 goons, they know there is either a cop, a jailkeeper, or a tracker and 1-shot bulletproof townie, and similar if they have a roleblocker instead. And each town power role appears in 2 setups, so they also have a clue. The mystery of which setup we're in will change how mafia plays because they don't know what roles there are and have to counterplay all or none of them.
Otherwise if you're a Power Role
(Jailkeeper, Cop, Doctor, Tracker, 1-Shot Bulletproof Townie), mafia will either kiII, roleblock, or neither (if you're 1-Shot Bulletproof) you. The times when you should reveal your role are 1) If you are about to be voted out 2) If you have information that means somebody is mafia. 3) If you have information that means somebody else who is about to be voted out is town. 4) If the game reaches day 3/day 4. Hopefully one of us will be alive to explain why, but briefly this is the stage of the game where nights are scarce and the extra information is helpful. Now for specific Power Role strategies
First of all you can do something different depending on context or if you really disagree, but try to keep these in mind

1. Jailkeeper This is going to be up to your discretion largely, because you both roleblock and protect somebody. When both mafia are alive, you have less chance of targeting the specific mafia member who used the action. This also means if both of them are alive and you target somebody, but somebody dies at night this doesn't confirm them as town.
2. Cop: Again there's a number of options, but you should be trying to target people who are likely to survive to the end. If somebody is acting like a member of the mafia and will probably die the next day, it's probably not the greatest idea to check them. If they are a member of the town, you will have to claim your role and will (in most cases)not be able to use your role again.

You should also find a way to hide your results in your posts, so that in case you die at night without having claimed, we can use the fact that you are a cop to figure out who you checked during the night. This is probably easiest to do by just moving the player up in your reads (if they're town, if they're mafia you should probably just tell everybody that you are the cop and that player is mafia).

3. Doctor: Target whoever you think is going to die. This is normally either a player who is experienced (so that they stop posting in the thread and don't have the chance to figure out who the mafia team is), a player who is towny (because they won't ever get hanged), or a Power Role (normally only one that has revealed themselves). Since mafia normally don't even know if there is a doctor you shouldn't worry too much about trying to outsmart them.

4. Tracker: Ok I'm not going to lie this is one of the weaker roles, but it still can do great things. The first thing to know is the difference between a "No result" and "no visit" answer. The first one means you were roleblocked, the second means your target didn't visit anybody.

If you do get a result that a player visited someone, if they are the player who died, that is the mafia. If not, that's the doctor. If you get a "no visit" result, they could be the mafia whose partner did the kiII instead. This means you should try to target the player who is most likely to be mafia doing a nightkiII. This is subject to the mafia trying to outsmart you so be careful. Once only one mafia is alive you become a lot more powerful, congratulations! You are now basically a cop

5. 1-Shot BulletProof townie. Some people consider this a boring role, I don't. Your goal is to get mafia to try to kiII you, normally by being very towny, or just by surviving until mafia have fewer choices. That is pretty much it.
If you're mafia
First off, we are enemies, but it's my job to help you too (unless the mafia is exactly WisteriaV/ostriches88 in which case I hate you both). It's it's not very fun for anybody if you tell everyone else that you are mafia. That's about it. KiII the players who
1) Are most likely to successfully vote you out
2) Are least likely to get voted out
and/or
3) Have claimed a Power Role
As for how to post... You'll normally have to figure that out but try to post like you are town. As a mafia you have TMI, more on this later, but it makes it hard for you to accurately pretend to be mafia.

Also it might be worth figuring out what to do if your partner is under pressure. Do you try to save them (<- preferred) or vote them out as well to seem extra towny.
Ok I know I just spent a lot of time talking about power Roles but really, these shouldn't matter until at least day 2 and it's best not to talk about them because that's a easy way for mafia to figure out what your role is.

Third, let's talk about the structure of the game. I reccomend you read this just to clear up any questions about this sort of stuff Game structure
There are 7 town members and 2 mafia members. I'll do my best to call them mafia throughout this post & the game but mafia are also known as wolves or scum. The mafia want to kiII everyone and the town want to stop that by voting out the mafia. The town's strength is their numbers, the mafia's strength is knowing each other (and their night kiII).

The game alternates between day and night phases, starting with day 1 right now. During the day, players make posts, and then based on those posts they vote somebody out. It's important not to edit or delete posts or to talk about the game even to people not in the game because it can create information imbalances that shouldn't be there. Some examples
In more malicious cases a player can make a post while one other player is in the thread, claiming a role, for example, and then edit it once they've seen it. This is bad and is as such against the rules. Even if you talk to someone outside of the game, there can be issues such as that player talking to somebody else in the game, or them giving you ideas. Note that this is not an invitation to break the rules or to challenge them (in thread, you can go bug fdas if you want); it's just the first things that come to mind as examples for why the exist. Just don't.
Make a new post in the thread if you want to edit, and if you want to talk about the game outside of the thread... either talk in thread or in your Role PM, or wait for the game to end. The wolves have a private chat where they can talk to each other during the day and the night.

During the night, nobody can post in the thread. The mafia choose somebody to kiII, and the power roles choose somebody to target. This is generally a good time to take a break from the thread if you're not a mafia.


Now comes the strategy/gameplay tips:
1) Make posts! (IF you're alive and it's day and they're in thread and game-relevant) Mafia runs on posts, posting is the entire game. Ideally you should be on the thread for at least 10 minutes each (real-life) day but just one post every 48 hours works too! Do try to keep them relevant to the game. For example (read this one, i define what a read is kind of)
does this post:
ostriches88 wrote:
I am eating a sandwich & playing league of dominion stars
tell you anything about the poster's alignment? No, not really. Instead you should be focusing on making reads. "reads" is the shorthand for an argument about another player. e.g.
WisteriaV wrote:
ad333 is a wolf for making a really long post, because nobody would read all of that and they know it!
(Note this isn't a particularly good read).


2) Read every post at least once.
This doesn't mean to make a read on every post, but you should read them all. It 's a better way to make more accurate reads and avoids redundancy example of players not reading
WisteriaV wrote:
I think ad333 is a mafia for making more than 10 posts
ad333 wrote:
Wow it sure is a good thing nobody thinks I'm mafia, especially you WisteriaV! That's why I think you're town
ostriches88 wrote:
Hey wisteria what's your read on ad333?
WisteriaV wrote:
ToT


3) Try to be in the thread at the same time as other people
(i.e. making posts at the same time as other people are posting). It's both more efficient and can be helpful for making reads when you're talking to somebody in "real time"
Examples
First let's look at what the opposite can look like
ad333 wrote:
Hey WisteriaV do you want to vote ostriches88
8 hours later
WisteriaV wrote:
Not particularly, he's been giving a lot of good reads on players like fdas
10 hours later
ad333 wrote:
What do you mean his read on fdas sucks; fdas does that in every game!
6 hours later
WisteriaV wrote:
Hmmm... I'll consider it. votes ostriches88
Besides taking 24 hours for something that doesn't really need that long, there's less pressure & people both have more time to craft their posts but also get across less information.
Compare that to a real-timing example:
ad333 wrote:
Hey ostriches why do you townread fdas? he does that every game
ostriches88 wrote:
Yeah but the way he does it is different, he posts twice as much when he's town
ad333 wrote:
Ok but in 250 he clearly had other motivation behind that; you pointed that out
ostriches88 wrote:
Ok i forgot but he's just town!!
ad333 wrote:
Hmm that seems like TMI


4) Watch out for classic mafia tells
The most fundamental tells could be considered TMI and awkward tone. First let's talk about awkward tone. If anybody's familiar with IRL mafia that's generally how that game is played. Players who are mafia tend to act weird because they are trying to fit in too much, and this does come across in posts too.

TMI is the general concept that mafia players know which reads are correct and which aren't which can lead to things like making reads on town players for little reason. In trying to counter this (or for other reasons) players sometimes don't take a stance on a player example
ad333 wrote:
Well I don't know... WisteriaV could be a wolf but she could also be town
I mean that is technically true but it doesn't tell you anything.


5) It's also good to find other players who are town.
If you're confident somebody else is town, congratulations you're closer to winning. If everybody can agree that 5 players (including those kiIIed at night but not at day) are town that normally lets you just kiII everybody else. But beyond that you can bounce ideas off the other person without fear that they're lying to you! Win/win.

6) Quote posts pleasee
You don;t want to be this person:
ad333 wrote:
Hey remember that time that ostriches was talking about why they think fdas is town? I think it's wolfy
Instead be this person:
ad333 wrote:
ostriches88 wrote:
fdas is town for being a great mod!
I think this is wolfy
(This one is mostly for my sanity but it makes your arguments better too!)

That's probably good enough (especially if somebody else walled but I will leave you with Secret tip for day 3/4
No seriously don't look this is a time capsule
If an experienced player who you expect to die at night has survived and you don't have a good reason for that (even if you do) you should make very sure they're town. Mafia can't die at night. Be careful because this line of reasoning can be used to mindlessly vote out such a player who's town especially if mafia is trying to push towards that goal.


Now for some FAQ*
Why don't we just hang nobody day 1?
I can't really phrase this better than an older player so...
aroodman wrote:
Often, on the first day, newbies will say things like “We shouldn’t hang today because we have no information”. The problem is that if we don’t hang, the next day will be the exact same but with one town player kiIIed by the mafia. Night kiIIs are guaranteed to hit town. Hangs aren’t. That’s why we need to hang as many times as possible.

But we don't have any information!
That's where reads come in. The way that other players post is the only real tell we have as to their alignment, this is how the game is played for the most part. This is why it's important to post, because if you have more posts you can be read better (and are reading other people more hopefully

Can I post when I'm dead?
No!!

How do I read more experienced players
I mean really just try whatever. We might object if it's leading you too far down the wrong path, but otherwise it can't really hurt. & If you want you can ask us if a read works on us and we probably won't lie. Truth be told I'm not that great at reading the other two players (don't tell them)

I have a feeling about another players alignment but cant explain it
This is not ideal, but you should post it anyways. Try to include the posts that gave you the feeling and explain it as best you can but don't worry. Maybe somebody else can figure it out, or it can be useful as a starting point for other things.

Im being attacked in the thread & cant defend myself
Yeah this is often an issue. Some solutions include: Attacking the specific arguments against you, Asking somebody else who thinks you're town to defend you, Just ignoring it and posting relatively normal anyways.

Can I say i'm mafia as a joke
I don't personally approve of it but sure go ahead, as either alignment, any role!

Are other posts going to be this long
Hopefully not but no guarantees also smh they're in hide tags it feels shorter that way

*Frequency of asked questions not guaranteed

Notes: i) examples are not really indicative of how the players type or like anything true
ii) I did write this post after getting my Role PM (but before gamestart)

The following sections are obviously most optimized for players who are not a Vanilla Townie but I'd advise you give them a quick read just if you are so that you're up to date with the strategies. Also I know everybody read all the rules, including the setup but [hide=Here's how the setup works]There are 6 possible setups, and one of them is randomly chosen. Nobody knows which one was chosen, but some players have a clue. If the mafia have 2 goons, they know there is either a cop, a jailkeeper, or a tracker and 1-shot bulletproof townie, and similar if they have a roleblocker instead. And each town power role appears in 2 setups, so they also have a clue. The mystery of which setup we're in will change how mafia plays because they don't know what roles there are and have to counterplay all or none of them.[/hide][hide=Otherwise if you're a Power Role] (Jailkeeper, Cop, Doctor, Tracker, 1-Shot Bulletproof Townie), mafia will either kiII, roleblock, or neither (if you're 1-Shot Bulletproof) you. The times when you should reveal your role are 1) If you are about to be voted out 2) If you have information that means somebody is mafia. 3) If you have information that means somebody else who is about to be voted out is town. 4) If the game reaches day 3/day 4. Hopefully one of us will be alive to explain why, but briefly this is the stage of the game where nights are scarce and the extra information is helpful. [hide=Now for specific Power Role strategies]First of all you can do something different depending on context or if you really disagree, but try to keep these in mind

1. Jailkeeper This is going to be up to your discretion largely, because you both roleblock and protect somebody. When both mafia are alive, you have less chance of targeting [i]the specific mafia member who used the action[/i]. This also means if both of them are alive and you target somebody, but somebody dies at night this doesn't confirm them as town.
2. Cop: Again there's a number of options, but you should be trying to target people [i]who are likely to survive to the end[/i]. If somebody is acting like a member of the mafia and will probably die the next day, it's probably not the greatest idea to check them. If they are a member of the town, you will have to claim your role and will (in most cases)not be able to use your role again. 

You should also find a way to hide your results in your posts, so that in case you die at night without having claimed, we can use the fact that you are a cop to figure out who you checked during the night. This is probably easiest to do by just moving the player up in your reads (if they're town, if they're mafia you should probably just tell everybody that you are the cop and that player is mafia).

3. Doctor: Target whoever you think is going to die. This is normally either  a player who is experienced (so that they stop posting in the thread and don't have the chance to figure out who the mafia team is), a player who is towny (because they won't ever get hanged), or a Power Role (normally only one that has revealed themselves). Since mafia normally don't even know if there is a doctor you shouldn't worry too much about trying to outsmart them.

4. Tracker: Ok I'm not going to lie this is one of the weaker roles, but it still can do great things. The first thing to know is the difference between a "No result" and "no visit" answer. The first one means you were roleblocked, the second means your target didn't visit anybody. 

If you do get a result that a player visited someone, if they are the player who died, that is the mafia. If not, that's the doctor. If you get a "no visit" result, they could be the mafia whose partner did the kiII instead. This means you should try to target [i]the player who is most likely to be mafia doing a nightkiII[/i]. This is subject to the mafia trying to outsmart you so be careful. Once only one mafia is alive you become a lot more powerful, congratulations! You are now basically a cop

5. 1-Shot BulletProof townie. Some people consider this a boring role, I don't. Your goal is to [i]get mafia to try to kiII you[/i], normally by being very towny, or just by surviving until mafia have fewer choices. That is pretty much it. 
[/hide][/hide][hide=If you're mafia]First off, we are enemies, but it's my job to help you too (unless the mafia is exactly WisteriaV/ostriches88 in which case I hate you both). It's it's not very fun for anybody if you tell everyone else that you are mafia. That's about it. KiII the players who

and/or

post_rendered:
Bud, chances are that you're getting k!lled anyways
If you leave a hypo it keeps the wolves guessing, and plus it may give us additional information depending on your flip if you die
the wolves are semi-aware of the setup, yes
in the case that there is 1 mafia goon and 1 mafia roleblocker, we have either a cop+doctor or a jailkeeper+1sbp. If you leave a hypo on a player that you currently think is wolf, then wolves will be unsure if you are a vanilla town, cop, jailkeeper (to roleblock), or just a 1-shot bulletproof pretending to be a visiting action.
in the case there are 2 mafia goons, we have a cop, doctor+tracker, jailkeeper, or 1sbp+tracker. If you leave a hypo on a player that you currently think is wolf, then wolves won't know if you are trying to track , jailkeep (to roleblock), or just faking your hypo.

here are the ways this could go
1. you leave a hypo and you die (we might get information from your flip)
2. you leave a hypo and you don't die (great, no harm there)
3. you claim and you die (this makes your action, if you tell us who you are visiting, extremely predictable and wolves can plan accordingly)
4. you claim and you don't die (this is extremely dependent on your claim)
5. you do nothing and you die (we don't know your action and get no info)
6. you do nothing and you don't die (unlikely scenario)

1) The game generally gets easier as time goes on, both in the same way it does within days as more posts makes it easier to solve (typically) but also having flips & mechanical info greatly helps too
1a) This also means that reads made on day 1 become less important over time. Like yes ideally we hit a wolf today, I'm not very confident in that happening & if it doesn't and I die I don't want people blindly sheeping (or blindly anti-sheeping for that matter) my reads.

3) To whatever degree power imbalances are a natural part of mafia I do also need to talk to people, ask questions, confer with them, etc.
4) Lest we forget this is a newbie game & I have relatively high faith in you all being able to teach the newbies, like I have more experience but that doesn't mean too much.

Most of this does come down to bad precedent though

hello! Welcome to F3, I guess. This is the last phase of the game and who wins the game is determined purely by who we hang tonight. Congrats to the wolf here for making it to F3, it is extremely difficult especially in a game with more experienced players.

Firstly, I’d like to apologize for mishanging mhgelgi. I thought that mhgelgi was genuinely wolfy for trying to bargain with me for his life. Hopefully we can still win this, as long as I vote correctly this phase.

Secondly, note that there is only three of us left. One of us is the wolf. I am not the wolf, because DittoDino the tracker cleared me already. This means that one of Ryouma29/fossasor is wolf, and I will have to decide. Both of you know who is wolf. Whichever one of you is town knows that you are town, and since I am town, the third person is automatically the wolf. And well.. The wolf knows who they are.

This means that the two of you (Ryouma29/fossasor) are going to cross. You will end up voting each other, because I was mechanically cleared by DittoDino so therefore am not wolf.

This phase is important for the both of you. I understand that the two of you have not given an enormous amount of effort to the game, but if there’s one time where I need you guys to be here, it is now. Whichever one of you is town will need to help me figure out you are town so I can hammer the wolf, and whichever one of you is wolf will need to convince me that you are town so you can win.

I have analyzed a lot of posts and interactions over the night phase, meaning that I have a general idea of who I think is wolf. However, my opinion may change, and I ask both of you to play towards your win condition.

Good luck!

post_rendered:
I think that one thing that in general people can work on as town (this isn't just f3, btw, I take most of the blame for the f3) is maybe... making yourself findable as town. Especially if some people, like me, it's just hard-coded in their brains to automatically wolfread whoever tries to suicide vote (an example being "i WILL die for this read" or "just vote me out but you have to promise to vote this person next") mainly because I think it WILL lose us the game at some point. If you know you are town then maybe don't encourage the rest of town to hang you because that wastes a mishang, instead maybe convince the rest of the town that you are town and that your option for the hang is the best one.
Like mhgelgi as an example, I found the trying to compromise with me part incredibly wolfy (like, say, let's hang fossasor because we both think fossasor is wolf, oh you disagree with me? ill wolfcase you then) and I felt that he was blatantly trying to get me to hang fossasor no matter the costs. I don't even think mhgelgi really tried to make himself findable until towards the end of the phase when we hanged mathisaac, but at that point I already wolfread mhgelgi because I thought the two of them were theatring with each other.
